'''chaguyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnidoblast|cnidoblast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnidoblast|cnidoblast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chaguyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chægiyith|chægiyith]] || [[word:chægiyij|chægiyij]] || [[word:chægiyish|chægiyish]] || [[word:chægiyi|chægiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chaguguyuth|chaguguyuth]] || [[word:chaguguyuj|chaguguyuj]] || [[word:chaguguyush|chaguguyush]] || [[word:chaguguyu|chaguguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chaguyuth|chaguyuth]] || [[word:chaguyuj|chaguyuj]] || [[word:chaguyush|chaguyush]] || [[word:chaguyu|chaguyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagufyuth|chagufyuth]] || [[word:chagufyuj|chagufyuj]] || [[word:chagufyush|chagufyush]] || [[word:chagufyuf|chagufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chaguyuthu|chaguyuthu]] || [[word:chaguyuju|chaguyuju]] || [[word:chaguyushu|chaguyushu]] || [[word:chaguyuku|chaguyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chaguyuth|chaguyuth]] || [[word:chaguyuj|chaguyuj]] || [[word:chaguyush|chaguyush]] || [[word:chaguyu|chaguyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chaguyuthul|chaguyuthul]] || [[word:chaguyujul|chaguyujul]] || [[word:chaguyushul|chaguyushul]] || [[word:chaguyukul|chaguyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chaguyuthuthu|chaguyuthuthu]] || [[word:chaguyujuju|chaguyujuju]] || [[word:chaguyushushu|chaguyushushu]] || [[word:chaguyuku|chaguyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chaguyuthun|chaguyuthun]] || [[word:chaguyujun|chaguyujun]] || [[word:chaguyushun|chaguyushun]] || [[word:chaguyukun|chaguyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chaguyuthuoro|chaguyuthuoro]] || [[word:chaguyujuoro|chaguyujuoro]] || [[word:chaguyushuoro|chaguyushuoro]] || [[word:chaguyukuoro|chaguyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
